message:
fix(export): sort comments by created_at then numeric id instead of lexicographic composite key

The previous comment sorting used lexicographic comparison on composite IDs
(e.g. "ISSUE-1:10" < "ISSUE-1:5"), producing incorrect chronological order.
Now sorts by (issue_id, created_at, comment_id) which respects actual comment
sequence. Adds a dedicated comment_id field to ExportCommentRow to support
the numeric tiebreaker, and includes a new test verifying the three-way
ordering (timestamp primary, numeric id secondary).

- Add comment_id: i64 field to ExportCommentRow
- Change sort key from lexicographic composite id to (created_at, comment_id)
- Fix existing test assertions to match correct chronological order
- Add collect_comment_rows_prefers_created_at_then_numeric_id test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
